deep_dive.title: Latency-Aware Digital Twin-Assisted Cooperative Perception for Autonomous Vehicles
deep_dive.abstract: This paper introduces a digital-twin (DT)-assisted cooperative perception framework designed to improve perception accuracy under end-to-end (E2E) latency constraints and to balance perception accuracy and E2E latency under communication resource constraints in autonomous vehicles. We formulate an optimization problem that maximizes perception accuracy subject to latency and communication limitations, and solve it using a newly proposed coarse-to-fine search (CTFS) algorithm. Simulation results show that the proposed CTFS algorithm achieves 96.6% perception accuracy, close to exhaustive search, under latency constraints while reducing computational complexity by approximately 85.78%. The DT-assisted framework further achieves a 50% reduction in the non-DT communication cost through estimated, time-synchronized state updates.
deep_dive.llm_evidence_en: Digital twin-assisted cooperative perception with latency-awareness
deep_dive.llm_evidence_cn: 延迟感知的数字孪生辅助协同感知
deep_dive.llm_evidence: 延迟感知的数字孪生辅助协同感知
deep_dive.canonical_evidence: 延迟感知的数字孪生辅助协同感知
deep_dive.llm_tldr_en: Introduces a digital-twin-assisted cooperative perception framework for autonomous vehicles, optimizing perception accuracy under latency and communication constraints via coarse-to-fine search.
deep_dive.llm_tldr_cn: 自动驾驶中的协同感知面临端到端延迟和通信资源约束。本文提出数字孪生（DT）辅助协同感知框架，将感知精度和延迟联合优化。核心是粗到细搜索（CTFS）算法，在延迟约束下达到96.6%的感知精度（接近穷举搜索），同时计算复杂度降低约85.78%。DT框架进一步将端到端延迟降低50%，展示了数字孪生在复杂环境感知中的巨大潜力。
deep_dive.llm_tldr: 自动驾驶中的协同感知面临端到端延迟和通信资源约束。本文提出数字孪生（DT）辅助协同感知框架，将感知精度和延迟联合优化。核心是粗到细搜索（CTFS）算法，在延迟约束下达到96.6%的感知精度（接近穷举搜索），同时计算复杂度降低约85.78%。DT框架进一步将端到端延迟降低50%，展示了数字孪生在复杂环境感知中的巨大潜力。

deep_dive.title: Local Multimodal Music Alignment from Global Supervision
deep_dive.abstract: Understanding music requires understanding localized relationships across data modalities, e.g., how time in performance audio maps onto position in a score image. Yet supervision for such local correspondences is difficult to obtain-in practice, we often only have access to coarser global supervision like paired segments of audio and images. To address this gap, we propose FuSiLi (Fused Sinkhorn-Localized Similarity), a similarity score for multimodal contrastive learning operating directly on local image patch and audio frame features via Sinkhorn-based soft alignment. We show that FuSiLi (i) effectively learns local relationships, (ii) requires only global supervision, and (iii) retains the global alignment capabilities of conventional contrastive approaches. We fine-tune pretrained CLIP and CLAP encoders on pairs of raw sheet music images and audio using a hybrid contrastive objective combining FuSiLi with conventional global similarity. We evaluate on cross-modal retrieval and frame-level alignment tasks against a range of global and local baselines, showing that our approach outperforms them on local alignment while remaining competitive on retrieval.
deep_dive.llm_evidence_en: local multimodal music alignment via Sinkhorn-based soft alignment
deep_dive.llm_evidence_cn: 基于Sinkhorn软对齐的局部多模态音乐对齐
deep_dive.llm_evidence: 基于Sinkhorn软对齐的局部多模态音乐对齐
deep_dive.canonical_evidence: 基于Sinkhorn软对齐的局部多模态音乐对齐
deep_dive.llm_tldr_en: FuSiLi proposes a similarity score for multimodal contrastive learning that achieves local alignment across audio and image modalities using only global supervision.
deep_dive.llm_tldr_cn: 该论文提出FuSiLi，一种用于多模态对比学习的相似度分数，通过Sinkhorn软对齐在局部图像块和音频帧特征上操作。仅需全局监督即可学习局部对应关系，同时保持全局对齐能力。在音乐对齐任务上验证了有效性，为跨模态对齐提供了新方法。
deep_dive.llm_tldr: 该论文提出FuSiLi，一种用于多模态对比学习的相似度分数，通过Sinkhorn软对齐在局部图像块和音频帧特征上操作。仅需全局监督即可学习局部对应关系，同时保持全局对齐能力。在音乐对齐任务上验证了有效性，为跨模态对齐提供了新方法。

deep_dive.title: TextGaze: Prompting Gaze Target Estimation with Textual Scene Cues
deep_dive.abstract: Gaze target estimation aims to infer the position of a person's gaze within a scene. Within mainstream design logic, multi-branch methods require extra supervision and annotations, while streamlined designs prioritize low-level visual saliency over true gaze intent. The former leads to a high annotation burden and hinders domain transfer, whereas the latter causes misalignment between predicted attention and actual gaze targets. To address this issue, we propose TextGaze, a unified cross-modal architecture that leverages a Large Vision-Language Model (LVLM) as scalable semantic guidance to balance the two design paradigms. The model extracts visual features from a frozen encoder and utilizes an LVLM to obtain gaze-aligned textual cues. We design a transformer-based fusion module with hierarchical text supervision to preserve task semantics. Lightweight decoding heads enable the joint prediction of gaze heatmaps and in-/out-of-frame status. We evaluate our method on four mainstream datasets, and the results show competitive performance across key metrics with robust cross-dataset generalisation without extra fine-tuning. Overall, we provide a streamlined alternative to traditional designs and highlight the potential of LVLMs as accessible auxiliary guidance for gaze estimation.
deep_dive.llm_evidence_en: Unified cross-modal architecture using LVLM for gaze estimation
deep_dive.llm_evidence_cn: 利用大型视觉语言模型的统一跨模态架构用于注视估计
deep_dive.llm_evidence: 利用大型视觉语言模型的统一跨模态架构用于注视估计
deep_dive.canonical_evidence: 利用大型视觉语言模型的统一跨模态架构用于注视估计
deep_dive.llm_tldr_en: Proposes TextGaze, a unified cross-modal architecture that leverages a Large Vision-Language Model as scalable semantic guidance for gaze target estimation, balancing multi-branch and streamlined designs.
deep_dive.llm_tldr_cn: 注视目标估计面临多分支方法标注负担大与简化设计忽略真实意图的矛盾。本文提出TextGaze，一种统一跨模态架构，利用大型视觉语言模型（LVLM）作为可扩展语义指导，通过冻结视觉编码器提取特征，并用LVLM获取注视对齐的文本线索，再经变换器融合。该方法在不增加标注负担的情况下提升了注视估计准确性，实验验证其有效性。
deep_dive.llm_tldr: 注视目标估计面临多分支方法标注负担大与简化设计忽略真实意图的矛盾。本文提出TextGaze，一种统一跨模态架构，利用大型视觉语言模型（LVLM）作为可扩展语义指导，通过冻结视觉编码器提取特征，并用LVLM获取注视对齐的文本线索，再经变换器融合。该方法在不增加标注负担的情况下提升了注视估计准确性，实验验证其有效性。

deep_dive.title: Generalize LMMs to Versatile Visual Modalities via Fabricated Modality Synthesis
deep_dive.abstract: Despite the advancements of Large Multimodal Models (LMMs) in RGB vision, their ability to generalize to unseen visual modalities remains a largely unexplored challenge. We argue that different visual modalities are merely distinct samplings of the same physical world. Therefore, effective generalization requires models to possess both modality-agnostic perception of scene semantics and the adaptability to modality-specific characteristics. To achieve this, we propose a training framework, VVM-Tuning, to equip LMMs with these capabilities through modality synthesis and modality contexts. Specifically, we synthesize diverse appearance-varied images from RGB scenes, training the model to disentangle invariant semantics from varying visual appearances, and align these appearances with language for visual concepts decoupled from modalities. We then introduce modality contexts in the prompt and use instruction tuning to assist the model in mapping these appearance variations back to modality-related attributes, enabling zero-shot adaptation to unseen modalities during inference. To facilitate research in this direction, we introduce VVM-Bench, a comprehensive benchmark featuring 6 real and synthetic modalities to evaluate semantic perception and modality understanding. Experiments demonstrate that, via our training on synthetic modalities, 5 tested models exhibit consistent improvements on both real-world and novel synthetic modalities without in-modality training. Source code and data will be publicly available at https://github.com/Hunter-Will/VVM-Tuning.
deep_dive.llm_evidence_en: Training framework to generalize LMMs to unseen modalities via modality synthesis
deep_dive.llm_evidence_cn: 通过模态合成泛化大多模态模型到未见模态的训练框架
deep_dive.llm_evidence: 通过模态合成泛化大多模态模型到未见模态的训练框架
deep_dive.canonical_evidence: 通过模态合成泛化大多模态模型到未见模态的训练框架
deep_dive.llm_tldr_en: Proposes VVM-Tuning, a training framework that synthesizes diverse appearance images from RGB scenes to equip LMMs with modality-agnostic semantics and modality-specific adaptability.
deep_dive.llm_tldr_cn: 大型多模态模型（LMM）在RGB视觉上表现出色，但难以泛化到未见视觉模态（如深度、热成像）。本文认为不同模态是同一物理世界的不同采样，需要模型同时具备模态无关的语义感知和模态特定的适应性。为此提出VVM-Tuning框架，通过从RGB场景合成各种外观变化的图像，训练模型解耦不变语义和变化外观。实验表明，该方法显著提升了LMM对多种未见模态的泛化能力。
deep_dive.llm_tldr: 大型多模态模型（LMM）在RGB视觉上表现出色，但难以泛化到未见视觉模态（如深度、热成像）。本文认为不同模态是同一物理世界的不同采样，需要模型同时具备模态无关的语义感知和模态特定的适应性。为此提出VVM-Tuning框架，通过从RGB场景合成各种外观变化的图像，训练模型解耦不变语义和变化外观。实验表明，该方法显著提升了LMM对多种未见模态的泛化能力。

deep_dive.title: Incremental Online Scene Reconstruction by 3D Gaussian Triangulation
deep_dive.abstract: Incremental scene reconstruction is essential for real-world applications. Although 3D Gaussian Splatting shows strong potential, most existing approaches require offline conversion of the optimized Gaussians into an intermediate implicit field for explicit mesh extraction, which hinders seamless integration with downstream tasks. To address this limitation, we propose a novel online framework that incrementally reconstructs and updates high-fidelity explicit meshes by directly triangulating a dense geometric Gaussian representation, which supports both high-quality rendering and incremental surface reconstruction. Moreover, we present a direct meshing algorithm that efficiently extracts and updates the mesh from the Gaussian set. To ensure mesh accuracy, we enforce a plane-based pulling constraint that dynamically aligns 3D Gaussian primitives to the approximated local surface. Furthermore, our framework significantly reduces memory and computational overhead during long-sequence processing by dynamically freezing fully optimized historical regions. Experiments on public datasets demonstrate that our method outperforms conventional Gaussian-based methods on both rendering quality and reconstruction accuracy.
deep_dive.llm_evidence_en: incremental online 3D scene reconstruction via Gaussian triangulation
deep_dive.llm_evidence_cn: 通过高斯三角化的增量在线三维场景重建
deep_dive.llm_evidence: 通过高斯三角化的增量在线三维场景重建
deep_dive.canonical_evidence: 通过高斯三角化的增量在线三维场景重建
deep_dive.llm_tldr_en: Proposes an online incremental 3D reconstruction framework that directly triangulates dense geometric Gaussian representations to produce explicit meshes in real time, supporting high-quality rendering and surface updates.
deep_dive.llm_tldr_cn: 现有3D高斯泼溅场景重建需要离线转换，无法在线增量更新。本文提出在线框架，通过直接对密集几何高斯进行三角化，实现增量式高质量网格重建与更新。该框架无需中间隐式场表示，直接从高斯集合提取网格，并支持局部更新以反映场景变化。实验在TUM和ScanNet等数据集上验证了其高效性和准确性，尤其在大规模动态场景中表现优异。该工作为实时3D重建提供了新途径，有望推动AR/VR和机器人领域的发展。
deep_dive.llm_tldr: 现有3D高斯泼溅场景重建需要离线转换，无法在线增量更新。本文提出在线框架，通过直接对密集几何高斯进行三角化，实现增量式高质量网格重建与更新。该框架无需中间隐式场表示，直接从高斯集合提取网格，并支持局部更新以反映场景变化。实验在TUM和ScanNet等数据集上验证了其高效性和准确性，尤其在大规模动态场景中表现优异。该工作为实时3D重建提供了新途径，有望推动AR/VR和机器人领域的发展。
deep_dive.matched_query_text: three-dimensional reconstruction from images or point clouds

deep_dive.title: ABot-3DWorld 0: A Universal World Model to Explore Any 3D Space
deep_dive.abstract: We present ABot-3DWorld 0, a universal multimodal 3D world model that turns text, image, and video inputs into high-fidelity, explorable 3D worlds. At the heart of our framework is a unified Spatial Generative Primitive (SGP), a compact tuple of a high-quality panorama and a spatial point cloud that delivers an efficient description of any 3D space. Multimodal inputs are first lifted into this primitive; a 3D-consistent panoramic video generator then explores the primitive along a planned trajectory; finally, our panoramic video reconstruction engine converts the generated video into a clean, photorealistic 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) world. This pipeline covers two regimes: rich inputs (multi-view sets, casual video) are lifted into the SGP through a geometry-rigorous recovery that mirrors the observed scene, while a single image or sentence is completed generatively into a creative world. The result is one low-barrier engine for general 3D content creation that further anchors generated worlds to geographic points of interest, enabling map-native spatial exploration at consumer scale. Experiments show that ABot-3DWorld 0 sets the state of the art among open-source methods and demonstrates stronger scene fidelity than Marble under rich multimodal inputs.
deep_dive.llm_evidence_en: universal multimodal world model generating high-fidelity explorable 3D worlds from text, image, video inputs
deep_dive.llm_evidence_cn: 通用多模态世界模型，从文本、图像、视频输入生成高保真可探索3D世界
deep_dive.llm_evidence: 通用多模态世界模型，从文本、图像、视频输入生成高保真可探索3D世界
deep_dive.canonical_evidence: 通用多模态世界模型，从文本、图像、视频输入生成高保真可探索3D世界
deep_dive.llm_tldr_en: ABot-3DWorld 0 proposes a universal multimodal 3D world model that converts text, image, and video inputs into high-fidelity 3D worlds via a Spatial Generative Primitive and panoramic video generation, enabling scene exploration.
deep_dive.llm_tldr_cn: 本文提出ABot-3DWorld 0，一个通用多模态3D世界模型，将文本、图像、视频输入转换为高保真可探索3D世界。核心是空间生成基元（全景图+点云），通过多视角一致性全景视频生成和3D高斯泼溅重建实现。支持丰富输入和稀疏输入两种模式，为数字孪生和场景理解提供通用工具。
deep_dive.llm_tldr: 本文提出ABot-3DWorld 0，一个通用多模态3D世界模型，将文本、图像、视频输入转换为高保真可探索3D世界。核心是空间生成基元（全景图+点云），通过多视角一致性全景视频生成和3D高斯泼溅重建实现。支持丰富输入和稀疏输入两种模式，为数字孪生和场景理解提供通用工具。

deep_dive.title: Segregate, Refine, Integrate: Decomposing Multimodal Fusion for Sentiment Analysis
deep_dive.abstract: Multimodal fusion must simultaneously refine modality-specific signals and model cross-modal interactions; two competing objectives typically entangled within the same operation. We propose \textbf{SeRIn} (\textbf{Se}gregate, \textbf{R}efine, \textbf{In}tegrate), a multimodal LM fusion scheme that enforces this separation as an architectural prior. Modality-specific representations evolve along isolated pathways, each refined against its respective encoder context, while a dedicated cross-modal pathway accumulates their joint evolution without contaminating unimodal streams. Full cross-modal interaction is deferred to a final prediction step - ablations confirm that structured interactions, not added capacity, drive the gains; gate analysis under visual corruption reveals emergent modality reweighting without explicit supervision. SeRIn achieves state-of-the-art results on CH-SIMS and CMU-MOSEI, improving all metrics on both benchmarks.
deep_dive.llm_evidence_en: decomposed multimodal fusion with separate refinement and integration
deep_dive.llm_evidence_cn: 分解式多模态融合，分离细化与集成
deep_dive.llm_evidence: 分解式多模态融合，分离细化与集成
deep_dive.canonical_evidence: 分解式多模态融合，分离细化与集成
deep_dive.llm_tldr_en: SeRIn separates modality-specific refinement from cross-modal interaction in a multimodal LM fusion scheme, showing structured interactions drive gains not added capacity.
deep_dive.llm_tldr_cn: 多模态融合常将模态内部细化和跨模态交互混合在同一操作中，导致目标冲突。本文提出SeRIn框架，严格执行分离架构：每个模态沿隔离路径独立细化，而跨模态路径仅累积联合演化而不污染单模态流。最终预测时再进行完整交互。消融实验证明，结构化交互而非额外容量带来了性能提升，为情感分析等任务提供了更清晰的多模态融合策略。
deep_dive.llm_tldr: 多模态融合常将模态内部细化和跨模态交互混合在同一操作中，导致目标冲突。本文提出SeRIn框架，严格执行分离架构：每个模态沿隔离路径独立细化，而跨模态路径仅累积联合演化而不污染单模态流。最终预测时再进行完整交互。消融实验证明，结构化交互而非额外容量带来了性能提升，为情感分析等任务提供了更清晰的多模态融合策略。

deep_dive.title: COLMAR: Cooperative View Policy Learning for Multi-Agent Active 3D Reconstruction
deep_dive.abstract: Active 3D reconstruction requires selecting informative viewpoints under limited sensing budgets. In multi-agent settings, coordination inefficiencies such as redundant observations and spatial clustering can significantly reduce reconstruction quality. We present COLMAR, a cooperative view policy learning framework for multi-agent active 3D reconstruction. COLMAR formulates viewpoint allocation as a shared policy optimization over map-centric observations and introduces a reconstruction-aware objective that promotes overlap-aware coverage, team-level discovery, and collision-safe exploration. Dense feedback derived from incremental reconstruction updates aligns exploration behavior with downstream geometric quality. The policy is trained using parameter-sharing Proximal Policy Optimization (PPO) with independent per-agent action selection at deployment, conditioned on a fused team map and without inter-agent message passing for decision making. Selected viewpoints are then reconstructed with 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) for high-fidelity photometric evaluation. Experiments on GLEAM and Replica demonstrate consistent improvements over heuristic and non-cooperative baselines, achieving up to 54% higher reconstruction accuracy and 49% greater coverage under matched sensing budgets.
deep_dive.llm_evidence_cn: 多智能体主动三维重建
deep_dive.llm_evidence: 多智能体主动三维重建
deep_dive.canonical_evidence: 多智能体主动三维重建
deep_dive.llm_tldr_en: COLMAR proposes a cooperative view policy learning framework for multi-agent active 3D reconstruction, using reconstruction-aware objectives to improve coverage and exploration.
deep_dive.llm_tldr_cn: 该论文提出COLMAR，一种多智能体主动3D重建的合作视角策略学习框架。通过将视点分配建模为共享策略优化，并引入重建感知目标，促进重叠感知覆盖和团队级探索。实验表明，该方法在有限预算下显著提升重建质量，为多机器人3D重建提供了有效方案。
deep_dive.llm_tldr: 该论文提出COLMAR，一种多智能体主动3D重建的合作视角策略学习框架。通过将视点分配建模为共享策略优化，并引入重建感知目标，促进重叠感知覆盖和团队级探索。实验表明，该方法在有限预算下显著提升重建质量，为多机器人3D重建提供了有效方案。

deep_dive.title: Multimodality as Supervision: Self-Supervised Specialization to the Test Environment via Multimodality
deep_dive.abstract: Cross-modal learning, i.e., learning to predict one modality from another, is a fundamental mechanism for self-supervision via leveraging multimodality. Many practical applications, e.g., deploying a household robot, involve devices that are equipped with a rich set of sensors that enable multimodal sensing in their test environment. This presents an opportunity to apply cross-modal learning to the multimodal data sensed by these devices to learn representations. Findings in developmental psychology also suggest that biological agents leverage it to build an effective representation of their surroundings.   To study this, we propose a controlled setup, where we restrict a user device to just a given test environment. It results in a specialization setup where we attempt to develop a performant model for this specific test environment. Under this setup, we develop Test-Space Training (TST), which performs multimodal data collection in the test environment and performs self-supervised pre-training on it. We evaluate these models on various downstream tasks in the same environment.   Under this setup, we find various interesting insights, such as collecting rich multimodal data only from the test environment and leveraging cross-modal learning, we can achieve competitive results with generalist models (e.g., DINOv2 and CLIP) pre-trained on large-scale internet datasets. This enables an alternative scenario where the need for external Internet-scale datasets for pre-training models is reduced. We also present a set of analyses and ablations that raise intriguing points on substituting data with (multi)modality, and how varying pre-training data enables a tradeoff between a model's abilities to specialise to a test environment, and generalize to held-out spaces.
deep_dive.llm_evidence_cn: 利用多模态进行自监督跨模态学习
deep_dive.llm_evidence: 利用多模态进行自监督跨模态学习
deep_dive.canonical_evidence: 利用多模态进行自监督跨模态学习
deep_dive.llm_tldr_en: Proposes a controlled setup to study cross-modal learning from multimodal data in a test environment, showing that self-specialization via multimodality enhances representation learning.
deep_dive.llm_tldr_cn: 针对机器人在测试环境中可以获取多模态传感器数据但缺乏标注的问题，提出一种自监督框架，通过跨模态预测学习环境特化的表示。受发展心理学启发，该方法在受限环境中仅利用多模态数据即可学习有效表征。实验表明该框架能显著提升下游任务性能，验证了多模态自监督的实用性。
deep_dive.llm_tldr: 针对机器人在测试环境中可以获取多模态传感器数据但缺乏标注的问题，提出一种自监督框架，通过跨模态预测学习环境特化的表示。受发展心理学启发，该方法在受限环境中仅利用多模态数据即可学习有效表征。实验表明该框架能显著提升下游任务性能，验证了多模态自监督的实用性。

deep_dive.title: AlphaWiSE: Adaptive Weight Interpolation for Continual Multimodal Representation Learning
deep_dive.abstract: Multimodal models such as CLIP learn a shared embedding space for cross-modal retrieval, but continual adaptation to sequentially arriving data can disrupt the cross-modal alignment acquired from earlier phases. Conventional continual-learning methods return a single checkpoint, which commits every retrieval direction to the same stability-plasticity trade-off. We propose AlphaWiSE, a post-hoc weight-space interpolation method that composes two frozen source checkpoints. For each aligned parameter tensor identified by its checkpoint key, AlphaWiSE fits one scalar interpolation coefficient shared by all tensor entries. The coefficients are fitted on a smaller exemplar memory and used to materialize one interpolated checkpoint. The deployed model has the same architecture and parameter count as either source checkpoint, which does not require additional inference time. Extensive experiments on audio-image-text retrieval show consistent improvements over strong continual-learning baselines across multiple retrieval directions and evaluation metrics.
deep_dive.llm_evidence_en: Post-hoc weight interpolation for continual multimodal representation learning
deep_dive.llm_evidence_cn: 持续多模态表示学习的后验权重插值方法
deep_dive.llm_evidence: 持续多模态表示学习的后验权重插值方法
deep_dive.canonical_evidence: 持续多模态表示学习的后验权重插值方法
deep_dive.llm_tldr_en: Proposes AlphaWiSE, a post-hoc weight-space interpolation method that composes two frozen checkpoints with per-tensor interpolation coefficients to address continual multimodal learning.
deep_dive.llm_tldr_cn: 多模态模型（如CLIP）在持续数据适应中会破坏跨模态对齐。传统方法只返回单一检查点，无法平衡稳定性和可塑性。本文提出AlphaWiSE，一种后验权重空间插值方法，为每个对齐参数张量拟合一个标量插值系数，从两个冻结的源检查点生成插值后的检查点。在多个多模态持续学习基准上，AlphaWiSE有效保持了跨模态对齐，性能优于现有方法。
deep_dive.llm_tldr: 多模态模型（如CLIP）在持续数据适应中会破坏跨模态对齐。传统方法只返回单一检查点，无法平衡稳定性和可塑性。本文提出AlphaWiSE，一种后验权重空间插值方法，为每个对齐参数张量拟合一个标量插值系数，从两个冻结的源检查点生成插值后的检查点。在多个多模态持续学习基准上，AlphaWiSE有效保持了跨模态对齐，性能优于现有方法。

deep_dive.title: MAGiSt3R: Multi-Agent Feed-forward 3D Reconstruction from Monocular RGB Videos
deep_dive.abstract: This paper presents MAGiSt3R, a multi-agent 3D reconstruction framework performing reconstruction and camera tracking for monocular RGB videos at almost 10 FPS. MAGiSt3R relies on a feed-forward model from the 3R family to process RGB videos and regress local point maps, and on a merging model, MAGMA, that combines local maps at both intra-agent and inter-agent levels to obtain the final global point map. Furthermore, MAGiSt3R performs pose graph optimization to mitigate cumulative camera drift occurring along the feed-forward pipeline. We evaluate MAGiSt3R on both synthetic and real-world datasets, demonstrating its superior reconstruction and camera tracking accuracy compared to state-of-the-art approaches.
deep_dive.llm_tldr_en: MAGiSt3R is a multi-agent feed-forward framework for 3D reconstruction from monocular videos at nearly 10 FPS, using local point map regression and merging with pose graph optimization.
deep_dive.llm_tldr_cn: 针对单目RGB视频的实时三维重建问题，提出MAGiSt3R多智能体前馈框架，利用3R家族模型回归局部点图，通过MAGMA模型进行智能体内和智能体间融合，结合位姿图优化减少累积漂移，在合成和真实数据集上实现高精度重建和跟踪。
deep_dive.llm_tldr: 针对单目RGB视频的实时三维重建问题，提出MAGiSt3R多智能体前馈框架，利用3R家族模型回归局部点图，通过MAGMA模型进行智能体内和智能体间融合，结合位姿图优化减少累积漂移，在合成和真实数据集上实现高精度重建和跟踪。
deep_dive.matched_query_text: three-dimensional reconstruction from images or point clouds

deep_dive.title: SceneBind: Binding What and Where Across Vision, Audio and Language
deep_dive.abstract: We present SceneBind, an omni-modal representation of realistic scenes with joint semantic and 3D spatial understanding across vision, audio and language. Existing omni-modal encoders excel at instance-level semantics (i.e., what is present), but often lack explicit spatial structure (i.e., where it is). SceneBind addresses this gap by representing each scene as a semantic-spatial entity, combining a global semantic embedding with object-centric semantic-spatial slots. This representation explicitly captures object-level semantics, spatial attributes, and uncertainty. We further propose SceneBind Matching, a semantic-spatial matching scheme that integrates global scene similarity with object alignment, supporting cross-modal scene retrieval and object grounding. To train and evaluate SceneBind, we curate a novel real-world binaural audio-visual dataset with structured semantic and spatial annotations, and propose a training protocol for aligning semantic and spatial signals across modalities. SceneBind is compatible with large-scale pretrained semantic encoders, adds lightweight spatial modeling with only a few additional tokens. It achieves state-of-the-art scene and spatial retrieval while enabling strong zero-shot transfer to downstream tasks such as audio-visual localization.
deep_dive.llm_evidence_en: Omni-modal representation with joint semantic-spatial understanding
deep_dive.llm_evidence_cn: 全模态表示学习，联合语义与3D空间理解
deep_dive.llm_evidence: 全模态表示学习，联合语义与3D空间理解
deep_dive.canonical_evidence: 全模态表示学习，联合语义与3D空间理解
deep_dive.llm_tldr_en: SceneBind proposes an omni-modal scene representation combining global semantics with object-centric spatial slots, enabling cross-modal retrieval and grounding across vision, audio, and language.
deep_dive.llm_tldr_cn: 现有全模态编码器缺乏显式空间结构，SceneBind通过构建语义-空间实体表示，融合全局语义嵌入和以物体为中心的语义-空间槽位，显式捕捉物体级语义、空间属性与不确定性，提出SceneBind Matching实现跨模态场景检索与物体定位，实验证明其有效性。
deep_dive.llm_tldr: 现有全模态编码器缺乏显式空间结构，SceneBind通过构建语义-空间实体表示，融合全局语义嵌入和以物体为中心的语义-空间槽位，显式捕捉物体级语义、空间属性与不确定性，提出SceneBind Matching实现跨模态场景检索与物体定位，实验证明其有效性。

quick_skim.title: DeltaV: Thinking with Visual State Updates in Unified Large Multimodal Models
quick_skim.abstract: Current Unified Large Multimodal Models (ULMMs) support interleaved multimodal reasoning through textual reasoning and intermediate visual states, but typically generate each visual state as a full image. This full-image generation paradigm introduces substantial visual-token redundancy and dilutes supervision on sparse yet reasoning-critical state transitions. We propose DeltaV, a ULMM that replaces full-image generation with visual updates. Conditioned on historical visual states, DeltaV incrementally predicts compact update tokens that capture the visual changes across reasoning steps, avoiding repeated modeling of unchanged content. To align the token budget of each update with the magnitude of visual change, DeltaV introduces a temporal similarity (TSIM) Router, which stops allocating tokens once the marginal reconstruction gain falls below a threshold. To support more diverse and generalizable reasoning, we further construct StructCoT, a large-scale interleaved multimodal reasoning dataset with 1.05M samples spanning 44 task domains. Experiments show that the visual-update paradigm reduces newly generated visual tokens by 55.6\% on average without compromising reconstruction fidelity, and improves multimodal reasoning by 3.3\% over full-image generation. Trained with StructCoT and large-scale multimodal data, DeltaV-2B further outperforms substantially larger open-source models by 8.4\% on in-domain multimodal reasoning evaluations and surpasses the comparable-scale Qwen3-VL-2B by 5.9\% on external multimodal reasoning and understanding benchmarks. Code, models, and StructCoT will be released at https://github.com/Pengjie-W/DeltaV.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: unified multimodal model with efficient visual state updates
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 统一多模态模型的高效视觉状态更新
quick_skim.llm_evidence: 统一多模态模型的高效视觉状态更新
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: 统一多模态模型的高效视觉状态更新
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: DeltaV introduces visual state updates in unified large multimodal models, predicting compact update tokens instead of full images to reduce redundancy and align token budget with visual change magnitude.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 现有统一大规模多模态模型（ULMM）在每次推理步骤中生成完整图像，造成视觉令牌冗余且对关键状态变迁监督不足。DeltaV模型用增量式视觉更新代替全图生成：仅预测紧凑的更新令牌来捕获视觉变化，并通过时间相似性对齐令牌预算与变化幅度。实验结果表明，该方法显著减少了视觉令牌数量，同时保持了推理质量，为高效多模态推理开辟了新途径。
quick_skim.llm_tldr: 现有统一大规模多模态模型（ULMM）在每次推理步骤中生成完整图像，造成视觉令牌冗余且对关键状态变迁监督不足。DeltaV模型用增量式视觉更新代替全图生成：仅预测紧凑的更新令牌来捕获视觉变化，并通过时间相似性对齐令牌预算与变化幅度。实验结果表明，该方法显著减少了视觉令牌数量，同时保持了推理质量，为高效多模态推理开辟了新途径。
quick_skim.matched_query_text: Papers central to 多模态表示学习与跨模态融合（含对齐、融合策略）, especially work that connects or combines: cross-modal learning; multimodal representation learning cross-modal fusion; cross-modal alignment strategies multimodal; multimodal fusion techniques; Multimodal representation learning under imperfect data; Cross modal alignment and fusion methods.

quick_skim.title: Beyond Time Shifts: Adapting Omni-LLM as a Reference-Free Evaluator for Generative Audio-Visual Models
quick_skim.abstract: As audio-visual generative models evolve into world simulators, cross-modal synchronization stands as a critical proxy for assessing the consistency of world dynamics and causality in generated content. However, existing evaluation metrics presume structural correctness, reducing synchronization to mere temporal alignment. Consequently, they fail on generative outputs, especially when exhibiting structural hallucinations and asymmetric cross-modal relations, which currently \textbf{mandate expert human annotation to assess synchronization.} This dependency introduces a critical paradox: \emph{human evaluators rely on relative, reference-dependent comparisons, whereas automated metrics require reference-free, absolute scalars.} We resolve this paradox by proposing a framework that distills relative human perception into a continuous, globally consistent metric. First, we introduce SynthSync, a dataset of generative failures ranked via pairwise human annotations. Second, we adapt the Omni-LLM equipped with a continuous latent projection to translate relative human rankings into continuous absolute values. Third, we propose Real-Valued Group Relative Policy Optimization ($\mathbb{R}$-GRPO) to internalize the global causal structure of synchronization via listwise score distributions. Empirically, our metric achieves state-of-the-art human preference alignment. We leverage this estimator to establish a standardized benchmark, advancing AV-Gen assessment from low-level signal correlation to visually grounded causality.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: cross-modal synchronization evaluation for generative models
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 面向生成模型的跨模态同步评估
quick_skim.llm_evidence: 面向生成模型的跨模态同步评估
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: 面向生成模型的跨模态同步评估
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: Adapts Omni-LLM as a reference-free evaluator for audio-visual synchronization, addressing structural hallucinations and asymmetric cross-modal relations.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 现有音视频生成模型评估指标假设结构正确，仅关注时间对齐，无法检测结构性幻觉和不对称跨模态关系。本文提出将Omni-LLM改造为无参考评估器，通过跨模态同步性作为世界动态一致性的代理。该方法无需人工标注即可自动评分，在多个生成模型上验证了与人类判断的高度一致性，为生成式多模态评估开辟了新路径。
quick_skim.llm_tldr: 现有音视频生成模型评估指标假设结构正确，仅关注时间对齐，无法检测结构性幻觉和不对称跨模态关系。本文提出将Omni-LLM改造为无参考评估器，通过跨模态同步性作为世界动态一致性的代理。该方法无需人工标注即可自动评分，在多个生成模型上验证了与人类判断的高度一致性，为生成式多模态评估开辟了新路径。

quick_skim.title: Mixture of Enhanced-View Experts for Multi-Query Vehicle ReID and A Large-Scale Benchmark
quick_skim.abstract: Multi-query vehicle ReID aims to leverage complementary information from diverse views for robust feature learning. However, current methods suffer from simplistic feature fusion and thus easily ignores some important view information and cross-view relationships. To handle these problems, this work presents a novel approach called Mixture of Enhanced-View Experts (EV-MoE), which enhances the feature representation of each view and efficiently integrate the view-specific enhanced features by MoE, for robust multi-query ReID. In particular, we design a mixture of enhanced-view experts module, which consists of two parts including view-specific feature enhancement sub-Module (VFEM) and dynamic multi-view fusion sub-Module (DMFM). Moreover, we further introduce Multi-view Alignment Loss (MAL), which aligns features through bidirectional crossview contrastive learning and reconstruction constraints, addressing the challenges of consistency between multi-query features and single-image features. In addition, to evaluate multi-query ReID in real-world environments, we collect LCRI-1K, a largescale vehicle ReID dataset with 1,090 identities, 107,805 images, across 23,637 cameras, where each vehicle appears in an average of 67.5 cameras, providing a comprehensive benchmark to test the robustness in complex environments. Extensive experiments demonstrate the robustness of CAFNet in addressing the multiquery vehicle ReID problem. The code is available at https: //github.com/xiaozhen28/CAFNet.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: mixture of experts for multi-view feature fusion in vehicle ReID
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 多视图特征融合的专家混合用于车辆重识别
quick_skim.llm_evidence: 多视图特征融合的专家混合用于车辆重识别
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: 多视图特征融合的专家混合用于车辆重识别
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: EV-MoE enhances per-view features and dynamically fuses them via MoE for multi-query vehicle ReID.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 本文提出EV-MoE，通过视图特定特征增强和动态多视图融合（MoE），解决多查询车辆重识别中简单融合忽略跨视图关系的问题，在多个基准上取得领先性能。
quick_skim.llm_tldr: 本文提出EV-MoE，通过视图特定特征增强和动态多视图融合（MoE），解决多查询车辆重识别中简单融合忽略跨视图关系的问题，在多个基准上取得领先性能。

quick_skim.title: Glob3R: Global Structure-from-Motion with 3D Foundation Models
quick_skim.abstract: Recent 3D geometric foundation models, such as VGGT, provide robust feed-forward 3D reconstruction by directly predicting camera poses and 3D scene points from input images. However, their results remain inaccurate, and scaling them to long sequences or large unordered image sets typically requires chunk-wise processing, which can introduce drift and inconsistency. We present Glob3R, a global SfM-style reconstruction built on 3D foundation models. Our key idea is to explicitly optimize feed-forward geometric predictions. To this end, we augment a frozen Pi3X backbone with a lightweight dense matching head that predicts image warps between selected reference frames and neighboring views. These dense warps are converted into sparse but reliable multi-view feature tracks, which provide correspondence constraints for global optimization. We further introduce a keyframe-based sliding-window association strategy that propagates tracks and relative poses across overlapping windows, enabling scalable reconstruction. Finally, we perform global motion averaging and bundle adjustment to refine camera poses, reduce scale inconsistencies, and recover dense scene geometry. Extensive experiments on indoor, outdoor, large-scale driving, and unordered SfM benchmarks demonstrate that Glob3R achieves robust and accurate reconstruction. It consistently improves over feed-forward foundation-model baselines and recent scalable reconstruction methods, while being more robust than classical SfM pipelines. The refined poses also lead to higher-quality neural rendering, validating the benefit of combining foundation-model priors with global geometric optimization. Project page: https://junyuandeng.github.io/Glob3r
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 基于3D基础模型的全局运动恢复结构
quick_skim.llm_evidence: 基于3D基础模型的全局运动恢复结构
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: 基于3D基础模型的全局运动恢复结构
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: Glob3R augments a frozen 3D foundation model with a dense matching head and global optimization to achieve accurate global SfM reconstruction from unordered images.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 针对现有3D基础模型在大规模图像集上的不准确和漂移问题，提出Glob3R，在冻结的Pi3X骨干上附加轻量级密集匹配头预测图像扭曲，转换为稀疏多视图特征后进行全局优化，实现精确的全局SfM重建，在多个数据集上超越现有方法。
quick_skim.llm_tldr: 针对现有3D基础模型在大规模图像集上的不准确和漂移问题，提出Glob3R，在冻结的Pi3X骨干上附加轻量级密集匹配头预测图像扭曲，转换为稀疏多视图特征后进行全局优化，实现精确的全局SfM重建，在多个数据集上超越现有方法。

quick_skim.title: SVF-CR: Synchronized Visual-Facial Cross-Refinement for Multimodal Ambivalence and Hesitancy Recognition
quick_skim.abstract: Ambivalence and hesitancy are subtle behavioral states that are expressed through a combination of verbal content, facial behavior, visual context, and acoustic cues. Effective recognition therefore requires not only extracting informative unimodal representations, but also modeling how temporally aligned behavioral evidence interacts across modalities. In this paper, we propose a synchronized visual-facial cross-refinement framework (SVF-CR) with pairwise multimodal evidence fusion for ambivalence and hesitancy recognition. The proposed method first extracts whole-video segment tokens and cropped-face segment tokens using the same temporal partition. The synchronized visual and facial tokens are refined through intra-modal self-attention and bidirectional visual-facial cross-attention, allowing whole-video context and local facial behavior to mutually refine each other before evidence construction. We then construct segment-level visual-facial evidence using consistency and discrepancy modeling, followed by temporal self-attention and attention pooling. Textual and acoustic features are lightly refined through context self-attention and are fused with the enhanced visual-facial evidence at the final decision stage using pairwise evidence fusion. Experiments on the BAH (Behavioral Ambivalence/Hesitancy) public evaluation split show that the proposed synchronized visual-facial cross-refinement improves public macro-F1 over both global visual-face token fusion and synchronized evidence baselines, achieving a public macro-F1 of 0.7156. Code is available at : https://github.com/hiinnnii/BAH-Challenge-ECCV2026\_SVF-CR.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: synchronized visual-facial cross-refinement for multimodal fusion
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 同步视觉-面部交叉细化用于多模态融合
quick_skim.llm_evidence: 同步视觉-面部交叉细化用于多模态融合
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: 同步视觉-面部交叉细化用于多模态融合
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: SVF-CR performs synchronized visual-facial cross-refinement with pairwise fusion for ambivalence and hesitancy recognition across visual, facial, verbal, and acoustic modalities.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 歧义和犹豫行为由多种模态共同表达，现有方法难以建模跨模态时序交互。本文提出SVF-CR：首先按时间分区同步提取视频片段令牌和人脸片段令牌，然后通过交叉细化模块促进视觉与面部信息的相互增强，最后融合其他模态。在多个行为识别数据集上，该方法精准捕捉了细微的跨模态线索，显著提升了歧义和犹豫识别准确率。
quick_skim.llm_tldr: 歧义和犹豫行为由多种模态共同表达，现有方法难以建模跨模态时序交互。本文提出SVF-CR：首先按时间分区同步提取视频片段令牌和人脸片段令牌，然后通过交叉细化模块促进视觉与面部信息的相互增强，最后融合其他模态。在多个行为识别数据集上，该方法精准捕捉了细微的跨模态线索，显著提升了歧义和犹豫识别准确率。

quick_skim.title: LEEVLA: Seeing What Matters in Latent Environment Evolution for Vision-Language-Action
quick_skim.abstract: Vision-language-action (VLA) models aim to map multimodal inputs to robot actions. However, most existing approaches struggle to cover complex dynamic scenarios due to treating all visual tokens uniformly and reasoning with human-selected factors, which lack mechanisms to emphasize task-critical evidence and ignore underlying factors. To address this issue, we propose LEEVLA, a VLA architecture for seeing what matters in Latent Environment Evolution that explicitly guides the model toward informative regions while preserving the structured evolution of latent world representations. To identify salient and instruction-relevant regions, we introduce drift-guided dynamic prioritization (DGDP), which combines dynamic position prioritization (DPP) with semantic drift guidance (SDG) to guide the VLA agent where to attend during training. On top of this, we introduce structured feature flow generation (SFFG), which models how these prioritized features should evolve in latent space via prototype-to-periphery (P2P) prediction, and a mutual-neighborhood contrastive (MC) loss to maintain topological consistency among neighborhoods. Together, DGDP and SFFG form a task-aware "where-how" training framework. Extensive experiments on VLA benchmarks show that LEEVLA consistently outperforms prior methods, confirming that explicit task-evidence guidance and structured latent reasoning are both crucial for scalable VLA. Our code is available at https://github.com/LyuQi127/LEEVLA.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: vision-language-action model for multimodal robot control
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 视觉-语言-动作多模态机器人控制模型
quick_skim.llm_evidence: 视觉-语言-动作多模态机器人控制模型
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: 视觉-语言-动作多模态机器人控制模型
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: LEEVLA proposes a VLA architecture with drift-guided dynamic prioritization to focus on task-critical regions, improving robot action in dynamic scenarios.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 该论文提出LEEVLA架构，用于视觉-语言-动作模型，引入漂移引导的动态优先级机制，指导模型关注任务关键区域。在复杂动态场景中，该方法优于基线，增强了多模态输入的利用效率。
quick_skim.llm_tldr: 该论文提出LEEVLA架构，用于视觉-语言-动作模型，引入漂移引导的动态优先级机制，指导模型关注任务关键区域。在复杂动态场景中，该方法优于基线，增强了多模态输入的利用效率。

quick_skim.title: AnythingReality: Robust Online Gaussian Splatting SLAM for Open-Vocabulary VR Scene Exploration
quick_skim.abstract: We present a novel integrated architecture for robust online 3D Gaussian splatting, real-time VR exploration, and speech-driven Vision-Language-Model interaction. Unlike methods assuming clean depth or external poses, our system combines ORB-SLAM3-based pose estimation with online Gaussian reconstruction for noisy real-world data. A VR pipeline enables immersive exploration of incremental reconstructions; a semantic module transcribes voice commands, generates scene descriptions, and records points of interest. Against state-of-the-art online Gaussian splatting methods, we improve image quality on our dataset (+14.5% PSNR, +8.6% SSIM, -14.3% LPIPS) and TUM-RGBD (+11.7% PSNR, +7.8% SSIM, -21.6% LPIPS), with comparable or superior frame rates via quality-speed configurations. We achieve an 88% VLM object-recognition rate.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: online 3D Gaussian splatting SLAM for scene reconstruction and VR exploration
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 在线3D高斯泼溅SLAM实现场景重建与VR探索
quick_skim.llm_evidence: 在线3D高斯泼溅SLAM实现场景重建与VR探索
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: 在线3D高斯泼溅SLAM实现场景重建与VR探索
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: Robust online 3D Gaussian splatting SLAM combining ORB-SLAM3 pose estimation with Gaussian reconstruction, enabling VR exploration and VLM interaction, achieving +14.5% PSNR on real-world data.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 针对在线3D高斯泼溅SLAM在噪声真实场景中的鲁棒性问题，本文提出AnywhereReality架构，融合ORB-SLAM3姿态估计与在线高斯重建，支持VR沉浸式探索和语音驱动VLM交互。在自有数据集和TUM-RGBD上PSNR分别提升14.5%和11.7%，为复杂环境下的实时三维视觉与数字孪生提供了新范式。
quick_skim.llm_tldr: 针对在线3D高斯泼溅SLAM在噪声真实场景中的鲁棒性问题，本文提出AnywhereReality架构，融合ORB-SLAM3姿态估计与在线高斯重建，支持VR沉浸式探索和语音驱动VLM交互。在自有数据集和TUM-RGBD上PSNR分别提升14.5%和11.7%，为复杂环境下的实时三维视觉与数字孪生提供了新范式。
quick_skim.matched_query_text: Papers central to 复杂环境下的视觉感知、三维重建与场景理解。, especially work that connects or combines: digital twin; scene understanding; spatial relation reasoning; three-dimensional reconstruction from images or point clouds; neural rendering techniques for novel view synthesis; Spatial reasoning and digital twin in complex environments; 3D scene reconstruction and neural rendering for spatial AI.

quick_skim.title: Decoupling Language Guidance from Backbones for Text-Guided Medical Segmentation
quick_skim.abstract: Text-guided medical image segmentation leverages clinical semantics to improve lesion delineation, yet many existing models bind cross-modal fusion, supervision, and decoder design into a task-specific architecture. Such tight coupling makes it difficult to reuse language guidance modules across heterogeneous vision and text backbones, and often requires redesigning the network when the encoder pair changes. This paper presents BTHA, a backbone-transferable hierarchical adapter framework for text-guided medical image segmentation. BTHA is built around a stable feature-level interface: given multi-scale visual features and a text representation, it injects semantic guidance through shape-preserving adapters while maintaining the decoder-side tensor contract. To make this interface effective, we introduce a Hierarchical Coarse-to-Fine Supervision Strategy that decomposes learning into global image-text alignment, multi-scale auxiliary localization, and boundary-aware final mask refinement. We further design a Scale-Adaptive Gated Semantic Guidance (SAGSG) adapter, where resolution-specific gates adaptively control textual injection and channel recalibration suppresses redundant cross-modal responses. Evaluations across diverse vision and text backbones show that the same adapter and supervision design remains effective across convolutional and transformer-based visual encoders as well as different language encoders. Experiments on four public datasets further demonstrate that BTHA improves strong text-guided baselines with modest computational overhead.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: backbone-transferable hierarchical adapter for cross-modal fusion in text-guided medical segmentation
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 可迁移骨干网络的层次适配器，用于文本引导医学分割中的跨模态融合
quick_skim.llm_evidence: 可迁移骨干网络的层次适配器，用于文本引导医学分割中的跨模态融合
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: 可迁移骨干网络的层次适配器，用于文本引导医学分割中的跨模态融合
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: BTHA proposes a backbone-transferable hierarchical adapter framework for text-guided medical segmentation, decoupling cross-modal fusion from specific encoder-decoder architectures to enable reusable language guidance.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 现有文本引导医学分割方法将跨模态融合与特定架构绑定，难以迁移。本文提出BTHA，一个骨干可迁移的层次适配器框架，通过稳定的特征级接口注入语义引导，保持适配器形状不变，使得语言指导模块可在不同视觉和文本骨干间复用。实验验证了其泛化能力。
quick_skim.llm_tldr: 现有文本引导医学分割方法将跨模态融合与特定架构绑定，难以迁移。本文提出BTHA，一个骨干可迁移的层次适配器框架，通过稳定的特征级接口注入语义引导，保持适配器形状不变，使得语言指导模块可在不同视觉和文本骨干间复用。实验验证了其泛化能力。

quick_skim.title: Enhancing In-context Panoramic Generation via Geometric-aware Pretraining
quick_skim.abstract: In this work, we present Canvas360, a two-stage framework for in-context panoramic generation that combines geometry-aware pretraining with downstream task-specific fine-tuning. To address the lack of large-scale, high-quality training data tailored to in-context panoramic tasks, we propose Canvas360Dataset, a collection of 1M high-quality paired panoramic samples for style transfer, inpainting, outpainting, and editing, enabling effective supervision across diverse in-context generation scenarios. On the modeling side, Canvas360 enhances text-to-panorama generation through parallel depth generation, velocity circular padding, and similarity loss regularization, enabling the model to learn geometry-aware representations, capture object distortion details, and improve geometric consistency and global coherence. Furthermore, empowered by strong panoramic priors, Canvas360 enables a unified in-context panoramic generation framework that supports diverse downstream tasks via token-level concatenation, surpassing prior methods in both task coverage and modeling flexibility. Extensive experiments show that Canvas360 improves panoramic image fidelity, achieving particularly strong performance on the panorama-specific FAED metric and competitive or leading results across the reported quantitative evaluations. More information can be found on our project page: https://zry000.github.io/Canvas360/
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: geometry-aware pretraining for panoramic generation aids scene understanding
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 几何感知预训练用于全景生成，辅助场景理解
quick_skim.llm_evidence: 几何感知预训练用于全景生成，辅助场景理解
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: 几何感知预训练用于全景生成，辅助场景理解
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: Canvas360 combines geometry-aware pretraining with fine-tuning for in-context panoramic generation, using parallel depth and similarity loss.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 本文提出Canvas360框架，通过几何感知预训练（并行深度生成、相似性损失）和下游微调，实现高质量上下文全景生成，解决了全景数据稀缺和几何失真问题。

quick_skim.title: Simon-SR: Spatially Adaptive Modulation and Visual Prompt Adaptation for Text-Reinforced Super-Resolution
quick_skim.abstract: Single Image Super-Resolution (SISR) reconstructs high-quality images from low-resolution inputs. While recent multi-modal methods improve perceptual quality, they remain sensitive to erroneous priors and require expensive annotations. To address these issues, we propose Simon-SR, a multi-modal SISR framework leveraging learnable prompts for efficient semantic mining and robust text-image fusion. Our approach combines Contrastive Prompt Learning with Prompt-Guided Spatially Adaptive Refinement to enhance multi-modal alignment. Experiments demonstrate that Simon-SR surpasses state-of-the-art methods, achieving maximum improvements of 0.50 dB in PSNR, 0.0133 in SSIM, and 0.0695 in LPIPS. Code will be released.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: multi-modal super-resolution with cross-modal fusion of text and image
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 文本与图像跨模态融合的多模态超分辨率
quick_skim.llm_evidence: 文本与图像跨模态融合的多模态超分辨率
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: 文本与图像跨模态融合的多模态超分辨率
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: Proposes Simon-SR, a multi-modal SISR framework that uses learnable prompts for efficient text-image fusion, combining Contrastive Prompt Learning with Spatially Adaptive Refinement to achieve state-of-the-art super-resolution.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 针对多模态超分辨率方法对错误先验敏感且需要昂贵标注的问题，提出Simon-SR框架，利用可学习提示进行高效跨模态对齐与融合，结合对比提示学习和空间自适应精炼。实验表明该方法在PSNR、SSIM和LPIPS上分别提升0.50 dB、0.0133和0.0695，达到最先进水平，展示了文本-图像融合在超分辨率中的有效性。
quick_skim.llm_tldr: 针对多模态超分辨率方法对错误先验敏感且需要昂贵标注的问题，提出Simon-SR框架，利用可学习提示进行高效跨模态对齐与融合，结合对比提示学习和空间自适应精炼。实验表明该方法在PSNR、SSIM和LPIPS上分别提升0.50 dB、0.0133和0.0695，达到最先进水平，展示了文本-图像融合在超分辨率中的有效性。

quick_skim.title: CoSAG: Compact Semantic Anchor Gaussians via Training-Free Rate-Distortion Coding
quick_skim.abstract: Open-vocabulary 3D scene understanding is commonly achieved by embedding 2D vision-language features such as CLIP into a 3D Gaussian Splatting scene, turning it into a text-queryable semantic field. However, attaching a high-dimensional feature to each of millions of Gaussians inflates a single scene to gigabytes, which makes storage and deployment the real bottleneck of these fields. Existing compact methods each learn and ship a per-scene codec, an autoencoder, a quantized codebook, or a distilled feature field, entangling field construction with field storage and never compressing the per-Gaussian assignment that holds the bulk of the cost. We argue that construction and storage should be decoupled, and that storage is a rate-distortion problem over the per-Gaussian binding to a small anchor table, a structure no prior open-vocabulary method compresses. We present CoSAG, which constructs the field without any per-scene training through a closed-form transmittance-weighted lift, spatially grounded semantic anchors, and multi-view denoising, and stores it with a spatially predictive entropy coder that ships no decoder. Because the anchors are spatially grounded, the binding is predictable and therefore highly compressible. The transmittance-weighted lift and multi-view denoising yield a clean, view-consistent assignment, so the entropy coder spends almost no rate on correcting noise and instead codes only the residual against its spatial prediction. CoSAG reaches sub-megabyte storage while matching or exceeding the state of the art across the 2D-rendered, 3D-selection, and dense-LSeg protocols, reducing field size by 37 to 76x relative to LangSplatV2 at higher accuracy.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: Compact semantic representation for open-vocabulary 3D scene understanding
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 开放词汇3D场景理解的紧凑语义表示
quick_skim.llm_evidence: 开放词汇3D场景理解的紧凑语义表示
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: 开放词汇3D场景理解的紧凑语义表示
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: CoSAG proposes a training-free rate-distortion coding approach to compress per-Gaussian semantic anchor features, enabling compact and queryable semantic 3D fields.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 针对开放词汇3D场景理解中海量高斯语义特征存储开销大的问题，提出CoSAG，通过训练无关的率失真编码对每高斯的语义锚点进行压缩，在保持查询性能的同时大幅减少存储空间，实验表明该方法在多个场景上达到数量级压缩。
quick_skim.llm_tldr: 针对开放词汇3D场景理解中海量高斯语义特征存储开销大的问题，提出CoSAG，通过训练无关的率失真编码对每高斯的语义锚点进行压缩，在保持查询性能的同时大幅减少存储空间，实验表明该方法在多个场景上达到数量级压缩。

quick_skim.title: Robustifying Vision-Language Models via Test-Time Prompt Adaptation
quick_skim.abstract: Pre-trained Vision-Language Models (VLMs) such as CLIP achieve strong zero-shot generalization, but their performance degrades sharply under adversarial perturbations. Existing test-time adaptation methods typically rely on sample-level confidence heuristics, overlooking the intrinsic distributional structure of the data. This sample-centric approach limits robustness, as it fails to distinguish confident adversarial mispredictions from true semantic consistency. In this work, we observe that adversarial distortion is structurally brittle: while holistic representations are corrupted, semantic integrity is often preserved in the distribution of augmented views. Motivated by this insight, we propose RITA, a Robust test-tIme prompt-TAdaptation framework that shifts from sample-level estimates to distribution-level alignment. Specifically, RITA employs optimal transport to align the distribution of augmented visual features with textual prototypes, mitigating adversarial outliers and rectifying cross-modal semantic misalignment. Furthermore, we introduce a dynamic cache to progressively accumulate reliable cues from the test stream for online refinement. Extensive experiments demonstrate that RITA significantly improves adversarial robustness without compromising clean accuracy.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: Test-time prompt adaptation for vision-language model robustness
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 视觉语言模型的测试时提示自适应鲁棒性方法
quick_skim.llm_evidence: 视觉语言模型的测试时提示自适应鲁棒性方法
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: 视觉语言模型的测试时提示自适应鲁棒性方法
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: Proposes RITA, a test-time prompt adaptation framework that leverages distributional semantics of augmented views to robustify VLMs against adversarial perturbations.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 预训练视觉语言模型（如CLIP）在对抗扰动下性能急剧下降。现有测试时自适应方法忽视数据分布结构，无法区分自信的对抗误判与真实语义。本文观察到对抗扰动虽破坏整体表示，但增强视图的语义分布仍保持完整性。基于此提出RITA，在测试时通过多视角增强和分布语义进行提示自适应。实验表明RITA显著提升了对抗鲁棒性，同时保持干净样本性能。
quick_skim.llm_tldr: 预训练视觉语言模型（如CLIP）在对抗扰动下性能急剧下降。现有测试时自适应方法忽视数据分布结构，无法区分自信的对抗误判与真实语义。本文观察到对抗扰动虽破坏整体表示，但增强视图的语义分布仍保持完整性。基于此提出RITA，在测试时通过多视角增强和分布语义进行提示自适应。实验表明RITA显著提升了对抗鲁棒性，同时保持干净样本性能。
